reviews.review_description: I get the concept and I think this game would be alright if it didn't feel so wonky....it's kinda glitchy and has some issues and overall just needs to be refined. It definitely has potential but as it is right now.....I wouldn't bother downloading it at the moment.

From the moment you start this game you can tell it’s a bad one ,,, 

Only the left stick for both left and right turn and forward and back 

This needs a lot of work

reviews.review_title: Great idea but needs work gameplay
reviews.review_description: I like the idea and concept of the game but the gameplay needs an overhaul I'd work on making it fully immersive rather than mixed reality only because urban analog movement and not really person motion it glitches between hitting walls of  and the overall design of maps need to be a little bigger and missing a whole lot to the plot of gameplay I'd give it a 3 stars for a starter but I'd do some research of guardians Frontline population one rampage agents and contractor showdown to give you guys an overall idea of how aoot of people like their fps design played plus it may give some idea to how you want to take your game based on direction since each game has differences to the game play itself like a builder battle royal and a pretty much a shooter with elements mixed in
Doesn’t make sense. I see the lower half of my room but Im moving around walls and buildings. Very confusing and unnecessary. Make it make sense.

This is still in the works and is finding new ways to make the game  compatible with quite a few styles of playing giving it more options of play modes.  Totally worth checking out and following the updates. Join the Discord and stay tuned as the game grows.
